Un Vizhigalil Song Lyrics From Darling Tamil Movie
Singer(s): Harini

Un Vizhigalil
vilundhu naan ezhugiren
ezhundhume marupadi vilugiren.

Orr nodiyum
unai naan prindhaal.
Porkkalathai
unarven uyiril.
En aasai ellaam serthu
orr kadidham varaigiren
anbe...

Un Vizhigalil
vilundhu naan ezhugiren
ezhundhume marupadi vilugiren.

Dhoorathil thondridum
megaththai polave
naan unai paarkiren anbae..

En manam
kaanalin neerena aagumaa
kaigalil serumaa anbae

vilundhu naan ezhugiren

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Un Vizhigalil'?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and longing, capturing the essence of romantic emotions.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Darling'?

In Darling, the song highlights the romantic moments between the lead characters, enhancing the emotional depth of the story.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Harini and composed by GV PrakashKumar.

When was 'Un Vizhigalil' released?

The song was released on November 26, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Un Vizhigalil, the listener is taken on a journey through the emotions of love and longing. The song beautifully conveys the feelings of connection and desire between the characters in Darling. With Harini's soothing voice and GV PrakashKumar's melodic composition, it evokes a sense of warmth and romance. This track is perfect for intimate moments and celebrations of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Un Vizhigalil from Darling is a mesmerizing romantic ballad that beautifully captures the essence of love. Harini's enchanting vocals combined with GV PrakashKumar's soulful composition create a magical atmosphere. This song is perfect for anyone looking to express their deepest emotions and celebrate love.
stanzaMeanings: From your eyes, I rise and fall, and I keep coming back again.
I get lost in your gaze, and I keep disappearing again.
The moment I see you, I feel life in my heart. All my desires come together, and a message is coming, my love...
From your eyes, I rise and fall, and I keep coming back again.
Like a cloud appearing from afar, I see you, my love...
When you touch me, do you know how it feels, my love...?
Will my heart become like the water of a river? Will it flow into your hands, my love...?
When will the time to speak come, and will my thoughts come together here?
I keep wanting to be in the hands of love, my love.
Like flowers blooming, the hearts of women are indeed beautiful.
Like the colors of a flower, their hearts are indeed beautiful.
Even in the colors that appear, will my thoughts come together, my love...?
The wings of a flower are beautiful, and they are indeed here.
I keep wanting to be in the hands of love, my love.
From your eyes, I rise and fall, and I keep coming back again.
